data.name: CreateDatabase.TextLine1
data.value: VALT uses a simple database file to store your data.

data.name: CreateDatabase.TextLine2
data.value: Please set up a strong password to encrypt this file.

data.name: CreateDatabase.TextLine3
data.value: NOTE: losing your password is irreversible. Store it safely!

data.name: CreateDatabase.FiatCurrencies.Info
data.value: USD is always included. Select additional currencies:

data.name: Settings.FiatCurrencies.Info
data.value: USD is always included. Currencies in use cannot be removed.

data.name: Settings.FiatCurrencies.CannotRemove
data.value: Cannot remove currency "{0}" because it is currently in use.

data.name: Settings.FiatCurrencies.ConfirmAdd.Message
data.value: Adding new currencies will download historical price data. Continue?

data.name: InitialSelection.CreateOrLoadMessage
data.value: Create or load a database file:

data.name: ManageCategories.Tip
data.value: TIP: drag and drop a category inside another to group them.

data.name: Transactions.DeleteGroupConfirmation
data.value: Delete this group? Accounts will become ungrouped.

data.name: ManageFixedExpenses.AmountDefinition.Hint
data.value: Use Fixed Amount if the recurring expense has a fixed value (like internet provider services). Use Variable Amount if the amount changes (like electricity bills). You must define a range of the variable amount to better estimate your yearly expenses.

data.name: ManageFixedExpenses.Delete.Message
data.value: By deleting the fixed expense, all transactions bound to it will lose the binding. Do you wish to proceed?

data.name: FixedExpenseEditor.Validation.InvalidRangePeriodStart
data.value: Cannot set the new range period start below the last record

data.name: FixedExpenseEditor.ChangePrice.Message
data.value: To change the price for this fixed expense, the minimum date should be {0} (one day after the last related transaction). Do you want to continue?

data.name: ChangePassword.TextLine1
data.value: Changing the password will recreate the database file. A backup will be generated on the same folder.

data.name: InstallPriceDatabase.Error.Info
data.value: Cannot install price database. Please check the internet connection again.

data.name: InstallPriceDatabase.Info
data.value: To finish the install process, Valt needs to create your local price database. For that, an internet connection must be available. The process will take a few seconds.

data.name: Transactions.Columns.Sats.Hint
data.value: Shows the transaction priced in sats, based on the closing price of bitcoin on that date

data.name: Transactions.Columns.SatsPriceToday.Hint
data.value: Current fiat value of the sats calculated in the sats columns

data.name: Transactions.AddTransaction.ToolTip
data.value: You can also press F2 to add a new transaction

data.name: About.Tip
data.value: If you like the app, send me some sats to pay the bills:

data.name: Offline.Line2
data.value: You are seeing the last recorded prices.

data.name: Reports.SecureModeMessage
data.value: Leave Secure Mode to see the data

data.name: Reports.Wealth.TotalInBtc.Tooltip
data.value: This is your total wealth represented in bitcoin as a unit of account

data.name: Reports.BtcStack.PeopleWithSameStack.Tooltip
data.value: Maximum number of people who can have the same stack as you

data.name: Reports.LeveragePositions.LeveragedStack.Tooltip
data.value: Your BTC spot plus your effective BTC exposure from leveraged positions

data.name: Reports.LeveragePositions.LeveragePercentage.Tooltip
data.value: Percentage of your leveraged stack that comes from leverage

data.name: Reports.BtcLoans.AvgLtv.Tooltip
data.value: Debt-weighted average LTV across all active loans

data.name: Reports.BtcLoans.AvgApr.Tooltip
data.value: Debt-weighted average APR across all active loans

data.name: Reports.BtcLoans.CollateralPercent.Tooltip
data.value: Sum of collateral across BTC loans divided by your total BTC stack

data.name: Reports.BtcLoans.WorstCaseLiquidationPrice.Tooltip
data.value: Highest BTC price at which any of your loans would still be at risk

data.name: Reports.Statistics.WealthCoverage.Tooltip
data.value: How long you can sustain yourself with your current wealth without new income

data.name: Reports.Statistics.MedianExpensesEvolution.Tooltip
data.value: Your inflation measured in fiat. This is the increase in your expenses relative to the same period last year. Negative numbers mean a decrease in cost of living measured in fiat currency

data.name: Reports.Statistics.MedianExpensesSatsEvolution.Tooltip
data.value: Your inflation measured in bitcoin. This is the increase in your expenses relative to the same period last year. Negative numbers mean a decrease in cost of living measured in bitcoin

data.name: Reports.MonthlyTotals.Obs
data.value: * latest totals are calculated based on yesterday amounts

data.name: Assets.Delete.Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this asset?

data.name: ManageAsset_YahooFinanceHelp_Line1
data.value: You can crawl prices from the Yahoo Finance API.

data.name: ManageAsset_YahooFinanceHelp_Line2
data.value: Check for the correct asset code in their website, especially in their URL. For example, to crawl prices for the Brazilian company PETR4, the correct code is PETR4.SA.

data.name: ManageAsset_UseFixedTotalDebt
data.value: Use predefined total debt (fixed repayment amount)

data.name: ManageAsset_FixedTotalDebt_Help
data.value: Some platforms (like HodlHodl) set a fixed repayment amount at origination, independent of when you repay. When enabled, APR is derived from this value and the loan period.

data.name: AvgPrice.DeleteConfirm.Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this operation? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: AvgPrice.Profiles.DeleteConfirm.Message
data.value: This profile has {0} record(s) registered. Are you sure you want to delete it? All related records will be permanently deleted.

data.name: InitialSelection.FirstMessage
data.value: You need to create or select your personal database file to store your financial data safely.

data.name: TransactionEditor.Help.Tip1
data.value: Start typing in the Name field to see suggestions based on your transaction history.

data.name: TransactionEditor.Help.Tip2
data.value: You can also type on the Category and Account drop downs to fill the data quickly.

data.name: AvgPrice.Help.BrazilianRule
data.value: Brazilian Rule: The average price is calculated in a simple way, where profits uses the average price as base. It follows the brazilian accounting rules.

data.name: AvgPrice.Help.FIFO
data.value: FIFO (first-in first-out): Follows american standards for calculating profits, where each purchase is considered a separate stack and profits are calculated separately according to the purchase order.

data.name: Validation.PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters long

data.name: Validation.OldPasswordMinLength
data.value: Old password must be at least 6 characters long

data.name: Validation.QuantityGreaterThanZero
data.value: Quantity must be greater than zero

data.name: Validation.DatabasePathRequired
data.value: Inform a valid path to store the database file

data.name: Error.FileNotFound
data.value: The selected file does not exist

data.name: Update_DownloadError
data.value: Download failed. Please try again or download from GitHub.

data.name: Update_NoPlatformAsset
data.value: No download available for your platform. Please download from GitHub.

data.name: Error.IncompatibleVersion
data.value: This database requires app version {0} or higher. You are running version {1}. Please update the application.

data.name: ImportWizard_Step1Instructions
data.value: Select a CSV file matching the template format, or download the template to see the expected columns.

data.name: ImportWizard_SummaryNewItemsWarning
data.value: New accounts and categories will be created automatically during import.

data.name: ImportWizard_SummaryReadyToImport
data.value: Click Import to begin the import process.

data.name: ImportWizard_Hint
data.value: Tip: Download the template above and use any AI tool to convert any file format to the required CSV layout. Data must strictly follow the template format.

data.name: CsvImport_AccountNotFound
data.value: Line {0}: Account '{1}' not found in mappings

data.name: CsvImport_ToAccountNotFound
data.value: Line {0}: To-account '{1}' not found in mappings

data.name: CsvImport_CategoryNotFound
data.value: Line {0}: Category '{1}' not found in mappings

data.name: CsvImport_UnableToDetermineType
data.value: Unable to determine transaction type for row at line {0}

data.name: GoalType_StackBitcoin_Description
data.value: Defines a specific quantity to stack on the selected period compared to the previous quantity

data.name: GoalType_SpendingLimit_Description
data.value: Track spending against a budget limit in your main fiat currency

data.name: Goals_DeleteConfirm_Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this goal? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Goals_PriceDataTooltip
data.value: This value may be outdated and will be updated when daily exchange rates are available.

data.name: GoalType_Dca_Description
data.value: Track regular bitcoin purchases (Dollar Cost Averaging)

data.name: GoalType_IncomeFiat_Description
data.value: Track income targets in your main fiat currency

data.name: GoalType_IncomeBtc_Description
data.value: Track bitcoin income targets (e.g. from work, mining, rewards)

data.name: GoalType_ReduceExpenseCategory_Description
data.value: Limit spending in a specific category

data.name: GoalType_BitcoinHodl_Description
data.value: Track bitcoin sales. Set to 0 for full HODL mode (no sales allowed)

data.name: GoalType_SaveFiat_Description
data.value: Save a target fiat amount (income minus expenses)

data.name: GoalType_SavingsRate_Description
data.value: Save a target percentage of income

data.name: GoalType_NetWorthBtc_Description
data.value: Reach a target net worth in bitcoin

data.name: DeleteInstallment_Message
data.value: This transaction is part of an installment group. Delete all installments?

data.name: McpServer_RunningTooltip
data.value: MCP Server running at {0}. Click to stop.

data.name: McpServer_StoppedTooltip
data.value: MCP Server stopped. Click to start.

data.name: McpServer_ErrorTooltip
data.value: MCP Server error: {0}. Click to retry.

data.name: Statistics_Config_Description
data.value: Select categories to exclude from statistics calculations. By default, all categories are included in the median expense calculations.

data.name: Assets.Sell.Message
data.value: Do you want to register the sell of this asset in a transaction and delete the asset from this list?

data.name: Assets.Sell.Notes.RealEstate
data.value: Sale of property at {0} - acquisition price {1}

data.name: Assets.Help.Description
data.value: Track any asset in your portfolio: stocks, ETFs, crypto, real estate, or leveraged positions.

data.name: Assets.Help.NetWorthDescription
data.value: Assets can optionally be included in your net worth calculation. Since we don't track historical values, they are not directly added to account totals.

data.name: Assets.Help.SellingDescription
data.value: Use the Sell option (right-click) to register profit or loss as a transaction in your accounts.

data.name: Reports.CategoryFilter.SaveConfirmMessage
data.value: Save current category filter as default? This will override the previous default.

data.name: SimulatedPrices.Config.Description
data.value: Configure simulated BTC/USD prices to project your total wealth. Each line can be a percentage of the current price or a fixed USD price. Maximum 6 lines.

data.name: Tips.Message.Assets
data.value: Use the **Assets** tab to track any other holdings in your portfolio. Depending on the asset, you can fetch prices via **Yahoo Finance** integration.

data.name: Tips.Message.AvgPrice
data.value: Use the **Average Price** tab to simplify your accounting. You can track assets beyond Bitcoin and calculate different profiles for family members or just your declared portion.

data.name: Tips.Message.BulkEdit
data.value: You can select **multiple transactions** at once to **rename or change the category in bulk**.

data.name: Tips.Message.DateNavigation
data.value: When adding or editing a transaction, use **Ctrl+Left/Right Arrow** to go back or forward in date.

data.name: Tips.Message.FixedExpenseHistory
data.value: In the Fixed Expenses list, you can **right-click** and select **View History** to find all related transactions and their price history.

data.name: Tips.Message.FixedExpensePriceHistory
data.value: You can modify **Fixed Expense** amounts at any time. The **price history** is preserved so you can track the evolution of your spending.

data.name: Tips.Message.FixedExpenses
data.value: Use **Fixed Expenses** to track your spending across different periods. You can set **weekly, bi-weekly, monthly** expenses and much more.

data.name: Tips.Message.Goals
data.value: Use the **Goals** system to manage your budget by limiting spending per category.

data.name: Tips.Message.Leverage
data.value: If you are **leveraged in Bitcoin** (long or short), the **Reports** tab will show a new panel displaying your Bitcoin position accounting for leverage.

data.name: Tips.Message.LinkTransaction
data.value: You can also **manually link a transaction to a fixed expense**. Select the fixed expense in the sidebar and **right-click** the desired transaction. This can also be used to **unlink** a transaction.

data.name: Tips.Message.McpIntegration
data.value: Use the **MCP integration** to use Valt with your favorite AI assistant.

data.name: Tips.Message.Reports
data.value: Customize the **Reports** tab. Several indicators can be adjusted to correctly reflect the most relevant data for your situation.

data.name: Tips.Message.ReportsLongTerm
data.value: After using Valt for several months, the **Reports** tab will show more relevant insights, such as your **average expenses over the last 12 months** compared to the previous 12 months.

data.name: FixedExpenseOverview.NoExpenses
data.value: No fixed expenses for this month
